description_long: This is a pair of modern rectangular tables with light wood tops and slender, black metal hairpin legs. Each table features a minimalist design, with one table having a raised back edge and the other a flat surface. The rear view reveals two cable management slots and metal brackets, suggesting suitability for workspaces or shared study areas. The wood grain is visible, giving a natural and contemporary aesthetic. The tables are likely designed for collaborative or flexible use in urban environments such as co-working spaces, libraries, or public lounges. The overall construction appears sturdy yet lightweight, with no visible decorative embellishments.
description: A pair of modern rectangular tables with light wood tops and black metal hairpin legs, featuring cable management slots and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both tables side by side, highlighting the flat and raised back edge designs.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the thickness of the tabletops and the difference in back edge height between the two tables.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying cable management slots and metal brackets on the back of the tables.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the clean, uninterrupted lines of the table sides and the hairpin legs.
